Preview_Hint: Select a range in the list to see its first and last pages.
Tip_ZoomStart: Open the first page nearly full-screen
Tip_ZoomEnd: Open the last page nearly full-screen
Tip_About: About the app and update check
Tip_Postpone: Hide the prompt; you can update later via «ℹ»
Source_Placeholder: Drag a PDF here or click “Browse…”
Tip_AddRangePaginated: Split the selected pages into separate single-page ranges
Tip_Preview: Show thumbnails of the first and last pages of the selected range
Btn_CreateGroupPerRange: Create an output group for each range ►
Tip_CreateGroupPerRange: Each current range becomes a separate group (a separate file)
Overlap_Title: Warning: overlap with already selected pages
Tip_AddAgain: Keep the range as is — pages will be duplicated
Tip_AddWithout: Add only the free pages (the range is trimmed)
Hint_BlockSuffix: was not enabled: the current question about adding an overlapping range is unresolved
Conflict_Title: Resolve the page overlap between selected ranges
Tip_RemoveOverlapping: Keep only the ranges that claimed the pages first
Tip_KeepOverlaps: Leave ranges unchanged; the “No overlaps” mode stays off
Tip_BlockOverlaps: When on, overlapping pages cannot be selected (ranges and groups)
Err_EnterPageNumbers: Enter the first and last page numbers.
Err_PageRange: Page numbers must be between 1 and {0}.
Err_StartGtEnd: The first page cannot be greater than the last.
Block_ForbiddenAddOne: Overlaps are not allowed: {0} already selected. Range not added.
Block_ForbiddenAddMany: Overlaps are not allowed: {0} already selected. Ranges not added.
Msg_AddedPaginated: Added page by page: {0} single-page ranges.
Msg_AllSelected: All pages are already selected — nothing to add.
Block_DecideFirst: First resolve the overlap: “Add anyway” or “Discard”.
Block_ResolveFirst: First resolve the overlap conflict: “Confirm” or “Remove overlapping”.
Merge_Prompt: Group “{0}” already exists. Add the selected ranges to it?
Block_ForbiddenGroup: Overlaps are not allowed: {0} overlap already selected pages. The action is not allowed in “No overlaps” mode.
Block_ForbiddenPerRange: Overlaps are not allowed: {0} overlap. The action is not allowed in “No overlaps” mode.
Err_NoGroups: No groups to process. Add at least one group.
Err_ChooseOutput: Choose a folder to save the results.
Upd_OnlyInstalled: Update check is available only in an installed or portable build (not in development mode).
